name: api-gateway
description: API Gateway for Coconut Trading & Supply Management System

scripts.start: concurrently "node server.js" "npm --prefix \"../Finance Management/finance-service\" start" "npm --prefix \"../Inventory Management\" start" "npm --prefix \"../Supplier Management Service\" start" "npm --prefix \"../Order Management\" start"
scripts.dev: concurrently "nodemon server.js" "npm --prefix \"../Finance Management/finance-service\" run dev" "npm --prefix \"../Inventory Management\" run dev" "npm --prefix \"../Supplier Management Service\" run dev" "npm --prefix \"../Order Management\" run dev"
